results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - language extraction, resolution, sweep, and fingerprinting drive graph indexing
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - query verbs and compact rendering are the main read path over the graph
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - stdio-facing orchestration/storage layer that opens the DB and keeps data fresh

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP verb layer; `server.js` dispatches tool calls here for repo orientation, tracing, impact, and file/report queries.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph construction layer; walks the repo, runs tree-sitter extraction, applies framework plugins, and resolves cross-file references.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/storage - persistence layer; defines the SQLite schema and node/edge CRUD behind `.aify-graph/graph.sqlite`.
